commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: It is written in the seventeenth psalm [lxx] that the Gentiles will be admitted to the grace of God in order to receive salvation. For this is the voice of Christ, which predicted what would happen in the future. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: It was by mercy alone that the Gentiles were saved; hence they were bound to glorify God. It is a glory to God when they are blended together and united, when they offer praise with one mind, when they bear the weaker and when they do not neglect the member who has been cut off.
